descFull: 🚀 Start UI [web] is an opinionated UI starter from the 🐻 BearStudio Team with ⚙️ Node.js, 🟦 TypeScript, ⚛️ React, 📦 TanStack Start, 💨 Tailwind CSS, 🧩 shadcn/ui, 📋 React Hook Form, 🔌 oRPC, 🛠 Prisma, 🔐 Better Auth, 📚 Storybook, 🧪 Vitest, 🎭 Playwright
